examples: Interviewer: She said you were a good kisser!
Katie: Yes, Daniel is a good kisser, I really enjoyed it.
The car is wildly over-styled in places, particularly the kisser, which has the gall to plagiarize the Aston Martin One-77.
In his book on Jamie Dimon, Last Man Standing, Duff McDonald describes Prince as the ultimate ass-kisser to Weill.
